title: Super Mario Bros. 3 - Altered World 1 Map Music
description:
Cool, strange, funky altered World 1 music. I combined each of the different music alterations to make it sound like they are fully together. The music sounds interesting and intentionally corrupted, and my favorite part would be between the first and the second one. As always, I use game genie codes, and you can try out the codes here and also see how it sounds like in the levels:

0:00-0:38 YYLXUN
0:38-0:52 OXTVGN
0:52-1:07 ESSVYN
1:07-1:20 ESTVAN
1:21-1:35 OXGVPT
1:36-1:50 KKKVYN
1:50-2:04 XLYXUN
2:04-2:18 ESAVAN
2:19-2:33 AALVYN

=)
